title: 3x Leverage
description: Your next investment's return (positive or negative) is multiplied by 3.

title: The Hedge Fund
description: Your next investment has zero downside. If it's negative, you lose $0.

title: Insider Information
description: On your next turn, you will only draw 'Good' investments.

title: Blind Faith (All-In)
description: On your next turn, you are forced to invest 100% of your cash. Positive returns are doubled.

title: The Big Short
description: On your next turn, returns are inverted (losses become gains, gains become losses).

title: Monopoly Power
description: On your next turn, you will pull 5 investment options instead of 3.

title: Freeze Assets
description: Choose an opponent. They are forbidden from making an investment on their next turn.

title: Sabotage
description: Choose an opponent. On their next turn, they will only draw 'Bad' investments.

title: Wealth Tax
description: The team currently in 1st place instantly loses 20% of their cash.

title: Stimulus Checks
description: Every team except 1st place receives 20% of the 1st place team's cash.

title: Embezzlement
description: Instantly steal 20% of the 1st place team's cash.

title: Philanthropic Match
description: If you are not last, donate 25% to last place. If you are last, all others give you 6.7%.

title: Regulatory Audit
description: Flip a coin. Heads: +30% cash. Tails: -30% cash.

title: Bailout
description: If you have less than $2,000, your cash is restored to $2,000.

title: Hostile Bid
description: Target an opponent and roll dice. Higher roll steals 20% of loser's cash.

title: Economic Boom
description: Every team instantly gains 20% to their cash balance.

title: The Robin Hood
description: The team in 1st place loses 30%. The stolen cash is distributed evenly to all others.

title: Black Swan Event
description: All teams are forced to invest at least $500 in 1 random asset immediately.

title: Angel Investor
description: Gain $1,000 instantly, but you must invest 100% of your cash on your next turn.

title: High Stakes Coin Toss
description: Flip a coin. Win: +33% cash. Lose: Every other team receives $1,000.
